exampleResults.error: Error: xs.reduce is not a function

bundleNote: Mismatch: fresh=830 lines, reference=475 lines. First diff at line 2: fresh="<EOF>" vs reference="// Generated by Axon v0.5.0 transpiler"

adversarial.name: where-guard-fullform-violation
adversarial.description: Full-form fn with `where`-constrained param called with violating value: generated JS must throw at runtime

adversarial.name: where-guard-fullform-valid
adversarial.description: Full-form fn with constrained param called with a VALID value: must pass and return it

adversarial.name: where-guard-shortform-violation
adversarial.description: SHORT-form fn (`fn f(x: T) = ...`) with constrained param and violating value — README says guards are injected automatically
adversarial.actual: no guard emitted in generated JS; value 150 accepted silently
adversarial.note: Constraint guards are only injected for full-form `fn name :: (...)` declarations, not short-form.

adversarial.name: exhaustive-missing-case-checker
adversarial.description: @exhaustive match on a 3-variant union covering only 2 variants: checker should warn
adversarial.expected: checker diagnostic mentioning the missing case
adversarial.actual: warning emitted: "@exhaustive function 'area': match on union missing case for 'Point'"

adversarial.name: exhaustive-missing-case-runtime
adversarial.description: Same non-exhaustive match evaluated on the uncovered variant at runtime — what does codegen do?
adversarial.expected: defined behavior on uncovered arm (undefined or throw), not a crash
adversarial.actual: uncovered arm silently yields undefined (no runtime error)

adversarial.name: result-question-happy-path
adversarial.description: Result + `?` propagation: Ok flows through and is unwrapped

adversarial.name: result-question-error-path
adversarial.description: Result + `?` propagation: Err short-circuits and bubbles the original message
adversarial.actual: expected 2p/0f, got {"passed":0,"failed":2,"results":[{"ok":false,"desc":"err propagates","error":"assertion returned false"},{"ok":false,"desc":"err from second guard","error":"assertion returned false"}]}

adversarial.name: generics-instantiation
adversarial.description: Generic record + generic functions instantiated at several types

adversarial.name: let-mut-reassignment-scoping
adversarial.description: `let mut` allows reassignment; loop-accumulated value visible after the loop; inner shadowing does not leak

adversarial.name: let-immutable-reassignment
adversarial.description: Reassigning a plain (non-mut) `let` — an immutability-focused language should reject this at compile time
adversarial.expected: compile-time error or diagnostic rejecting reassignment of non-mut binding
adversarial.actual: compiles to JS `let` and reassignment succeeds silently — immutability of plain `let` is not enforced anywhere

adversarial.name: tagged-union-pattern-match
adversarial.description: Tagged union constructors + match with payload destructuring and wildcard

adversarial.name: pipeline-operators
adversarial.description: Pipelines |> with .field shorthand, `as` named intermediates, and stdlib sum

adversarial.name: typed-let-annotation
adversarial.description: Type-annotated let binding `let x: Health = 200` (natural way to use a constrained type on a value)
adversarial.actual: parse error: [line 3:6] Expected ASSIGN, got COLON (":") — `let name: Type = ...` is not valid syntax at all

adversarial.name: malformed-unclosed-brace
adversarial.description: Function body with unclosed brace — parser must report errors, not crash or hang
adversarial.actual: 1 parse error(s) reported gracefully, e.g. "[line 4:1] Expected RBRACE, got EOF ("")"

adversarial.name: malformed-bad-token
adversarial.description: Illegal characters in expression position — lexer/parser must recover
adversarial.actual: parser reported ZERO errors for malformed input

adversarial.name: malformed-incomplete-match
adversarial.description: match with a dangling arm and EOF mid-expression
adversarial.actual: 1 parse error(s) reported gracefully, e.g. "[line 4:1] Unexpected token: EOF ("")"

adversarial.name: malformed-unterminated-string
adversarial.actual: parser reported ZERO errors for malformed input

notes: chronicle/main.axn transpiles (store, async fn, on...change syntax accepted)
runtime errors surface as generated JS (no .axn in stack — source maps not yet available)

[adversarial] result-question-error-path: expected 2 tests pass; actual: expected 2p/0f, got {"passed":0,"failed":2,"results":[{"ok":false,"desc":"err propagates","error":"assertion returned false"},{"ok":false,"desc":"err from second guard","error":"assertion returned false"}]}

[adversarial] let-immutable-reassignment: expected compile-time error or diagnostic rejecting reassignment of non-mut binding; actual: compiles to JS `let` and reassignment succeeds silently — immutability of plain `let` is not enforced anywhere

[adversarial] typed-let-annotation: expected parses (and ideally validates the constraint); actual: parse error: [line 3:6] Expected ASSIGN, got COLON (":") — `let name: Type = ...` is not valid syntax at all
[adversarial] malformed-bad-token: expected parse errors returned gracefully; actual: parser reported ZERO errors for malformed input
[adversarial] malformed-unterminated-string: expected parse errors returned gracefully; actual: parser reported ZERO errors for malformed input
